title: Creeper Loading Screen - YouTube Edition
description: A creeper themed loading screen based on the icon used by the Official Minecraft YouTube Channel
body:
This simple resourcepack replaces the Mojang's loading screen with the creeper face seen on Minecraft's Youtube Channel icon.


Optifine Required

Can't use Optifine? Use the Fabric Drippy Loading screen mod instead! 


Instructions:

Unzip everything to .minecraft folder

Accept to replace everything

![ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f78b04f98231e8384f47cbafa0d7d80f41fafc_0.webp)
[**get a server here**](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3087)
